mustPass: Include home, treatments/services, pricing, booking and contact to match salon and beauty conversion needs.
Support strong visual presentation and clear booking flow.
Reflect trust needs for personal services through practitioner presentation, hygiene/trust signals and reviews when available.
Keep route paths Swedish and business-relevant.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not use generic tradesperson structure as the main model.
Do not omit pricing or booking surfaces for this category.
Do not imply medical outcomes, certifications or customer counts that are not provided.
Do not make the gallery the only trust mechanism; practical info and booking clarity are also required.
